android.widget.TextView.text: Tell me a lot on cars
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Cars are one of the most important inventions of the modern world. They combine mechanical engineering, electronics, energy systems, and design to move people and goods efficiently. I’ll give you a big overview of cars—how they work, types, parts, history, technology, and future trends. 🚗
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: A car (automobile) is a self-propelled vehicle designed primarily for road transportation of passengers.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Cars allow people to travel long distances quickly and are used for daily commuting, road trips, emergency services, delivery, racing, and more.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
